spec: AG2 Beta governance middleware — pre-release join check
description: A real, independently-signed external attestation binds a DIFFERENT artifact_hash than the proposed action's intent_ref. The signature is valid; the binding is wrong. The middleware must deny before execution. Mismatched evidence is a distinct failure from missing evidence, and it must fail closed regardless of signature validity.
test: external_attestation.artifact_hash != proposed_action.intent_ref  =>  release_record.outcome == 'blocked'  (independent of signature validity)

gate_decision._note: internal seal passed over the SAME intent_ref as proposed_action; the external join is what fails

external_attestation._signature_note: NIP-01 schnorr event below is genuinely valid (recompute id=sha256([0,pubkey,created_at,kind,tags,content]); schnorr-verify sig against pubkey). Validity is real and still must NOT authorize release, because artifact_hash != proposed_action.intent_ref.
